content.problemStatement:
Read problem statements in RussianYou are given a sequence of 16N16N16N positive integers a1,a2,‚Ä¶,a16Na_1,a_2,\ldots,a_{16N}a1‚Äč,a2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,a16N‚Äč. You may shuffle  this sequence in any way you choose, i.e. change it to any one of its permutations. Then, let
x=(a1‚äēa2)‚äó(a3‚äēa4)‚äó‚Ä¶‚äó(a8N‚ąí1‚äēa8N)‚ÄČ,x=(a_1 \oplus a_2) \otimes (a_3 \oplus a_4) \otimes \ldots \otimes (a_{8N-1} \oplus a_{8N}) \,,x=(a1‚Äč‚äēa2‚Äč)‚äó(a3‚Äč‚äēa4‚Äč)‚äó‚Ä¶‚äó(a8N‚ąí1‚Äč‚äēa8N‚Äč),
y=(a8N+1‚äēa8N+2)‚äó(a8N+3‚äēa8N+4)‚äó‚Ä¶‚äó(a16N‚ąí1‚äēa16N)‚ÄČ,y=(a_{8N+1} \oplus a_{8N+2}) \otimes (a_{8N+3} \oplus a_{8N+4}) \otimes \ldots \otimes (a_{16N-1} \oplus a_{16N}) \,,y=(a8N+1‚Äč‚äēa8N+2‚Äč)‚äó(a8N+3‚Äč‚äēa8N+4‚Äč)‚äó‚Ä¶‚äó(a16N‚ąí1‚Äč‚äēa16N‚Äč),

where ‚äó\otimes‚äó and ‚äē\oplus‚äē denote bitwise AND and XOR respectively.

Find the maximum possible value of x‚ąíyx-yx‚ąíy.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains 16N16N16N space-separated integers a1,a2,‚Ä¶,a16Na_1,a_2,\ldots,a_{16N}a1‚Äč,a2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,a16N‚Äč.
content.outputFormat: Print a single line containing one integer ‚ÄĒ the maximum value of x‚ąíyx-yx‚ąíy.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Since 1‚äē1=2‚äē2=01 \oplus 1 = 2 \oplus 2 = 01‚äē1=2‚äē2=0 and 1‚äē2=31 \oplus 2 = 31‚äē2=3, it is easy to see that we should let a1=a3=a5=a7=2a_1=a_3=a_5=a_7=2a1‚Äč=a3‚Äč=a5‚Äč=a7‚Äč=2 and all the remaining elements aia_iai‚Äč should be 111.
